mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.parent_id AS parentId, d.name, d.sort, d.ancestors, d.status, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.dept_id = d.id AND u.deleted = 0) AS userCount FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort, d.id
SELECT id FROM sys_dept WHERE deleted = 0 AND ( id = #{deptId} OR CONCAT(',', ancestors, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{deptId}, ',%') )
